data.title: Vitalik Buterin bets big on decentralized social media with Farcaster/Lens trade. Users urged to stay put amidst changes.
data.description: There is a significant shift happening in the decentralized social media space as Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin has urged users to remain engaged with the platform. The encouragement comes at a crucial time as the sector is experiencing a rapid transformation. The decentralized social media landscape is witnessing notable changes in user behavior and engagement. Vitalik Buterin's call to users is a response to this evolving landscape. It signifies the importance of user participation in the decentralized social media sphere. This development highlights the growing interest in decentralized platforms, with Buterin's message serving as a catalyst for increased user activity. It underscores the potential for further growth and evolution in the decentralized social media sector. As users navigate these changes, Vitalik Buterin's guidance reinforces the value of persistence and engagement in the decentralized social media space.

data.title: American Express Global Business Travel reduced interest rate and increased liquidity in NEW YORK.
data.description: American Express Global Business Travel announced a reduction in its interest rate alongside an increase in liquidity. The company took steps to lower the interest rate to promote cost savings. This move is expected to positively impact the company's financial standing. Additionally, an increase in liquidity was revealed, signaling improved access to funds for operational needs. This decision reflects the company's strategic approach to financial management.

data.title: Rocket Lab updates on Neutron rocket development on Jan. 21, 2026 in Calif. (Nasdaq: RKLB) - an update on their launch services and space systems.
data.description: In Long Beach, California, on January 21, 2026, Rocket Lab Corporation (Nasdaq: RKLB) disclosed information about advancements in its Neutron rocket development. Rocket Lab, renowned for its launch offerings and space technology, revealed this latest update.

data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, a Vancouver-centric real estate company, Madison Pacific Properties Inc., (trading as TSX: MPC and MPC.C) announced the declaration of a dividend on January 21, 2026.

data.title: MILESEEY Golf introduces GeneSonic Pro, the first golf speaker with detachable GPS handheld, at PGA Show 2026. Expanding beyond rangefinders.
data.description: MILESEEY Golf has broken new ground with the launch of the GeneSonic Pro, transitioning from rangefinders to advanced golf technology. The groundbreaking World's First Golf Speaker was officially introduced on January 21, 2026, in CITY OF INDUSTRY, Calif. This move showcases the company's commitment to innovation and expansion in the golf market.

data.title: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP investigates FONAR Corporation stockholders, starting Jan. 21, 2026, as per PRNewswire.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, law firm Levi & Korsinsky, LLP released a statement addressed to all individuals or entities holding stock in FONAR Corporation ("FONR" or the "Company") under the ticker NASDAQ: FONR. The firm has initiated action...

data.title: Kasada introduces AI Agent Trust for secure agentic commerce, enhancing online security. #AI #Commerce #Kasada
data.description: Kasada has unveiled the AI Agent Trust, a new initiative aimed at bolstering secure agentic commerce. The program, designed to enhance trust in AI agents, will provide a comprehensive framework for ensuring secure transactions in the digital realm. This development comes as part of Kasada's ongoing efforts to address cybersecurity concerns, with a particular focus on safeguarding commercial interactions.

data.title: Investigation launched into Corcept Therapeutics (CORT) after 50% share price drop due to FDA CRL. Investors urged to contact firm.
data.description: On December 31, 2025, shareholders of Corcept Therapeutics Incorporated (NASDAQ: CORT) experienced a sharp decline of 50% in the stock price following the company's disclosure of receiving a complete response letter ("CRL") from the FDA regarding its proposed treatment. This news came after the company's attempt to introduce a new treatment for a certain medical condition.

data.title: AGI likely in coming years, warns Anthropic CEO. Expect job losses due to AI advances posing risks to industries.
data.description: According to top industry leaders, progress towards achieving human-level artificial intelligence (AI) is rapidly increasing, posing potential risks of job displacement and disruption to various institutions. This development underscores the need for proactive measures to address the implications of AI advancement.
